items.title: Trump says he will be 'indirectly' involved in Iran nuclear talks
items.dek: Speaking ahead of negotiations on Tuesday, the US president says he believes Iran wants to make a deal.
items.body: Speaking ahead of negotiations on Tuesday, the US president says he believes Iran wants to make a deal.

items.title: Hillary Clinton accuses Trump administration of Epstein files 'cover-up' in BBC interview
items.dek: "Get the files out. They are slow-walking it," the former US secretary of state says. The White House says it has done "more for the victims than Democrats ever
items.body: "Get the files out. They are slow-walking it," the former US secretary of state says. The White House says it has done "more for the victims than Democrats ever did".
